title: 4.2 Post Sample Index PCR Size Selection – SPRIselect
author: Opentrons
description: This is the fourth of four parts for a custom PCR prep followed by two stage cleanup. This is the second of two cleanups.
steps_raw: This is the fourth of four parts for a custom PCR prep followed by two stage cleanup. This is the second of two cleanups.
100 uL of SPRI beads are added to the samples
The samples and beads are mixed
The beads are left to incubate for 5 minutes on the samples
Magnetic module is engaged for 5 minutes to separate the beads before removing the resulting supernatant
Beads are washed twice with 200 uL of ethanol, disposing of ethanol each time
41 uL of elution solution is added to the samples and mixed
Samples are left to elute for 2 minutes
Magnetic module is engaged for 5 minutes to separate beads
40 uL of now eluted sample is transferred to column 4 on the 96 well plate
materials_raw: Biorad 96 Well Plate 200 µL to hold Generic PCR Strips
Eppendorf 96 Well Plate 200 µL on Opentrons Semi-Skirted Adapter
Eppendorf 96 Well Plate 200 µL on Aluminum Block 200 µL
Opentrons 24 Well Aluminum Block with NEST 2 mL Snapcap
Opentrons 96 Tip Rack 300 µL or Opentrons 96 Filter Tip Rack 200 µL
